summary: A game project (RPG/combat) where the user is rebalancing combat. Enemy/monster defense is being reduced by 80% due to combat feeling unbalanced (9 strength hitting level 1 enemies for only 1 damage).
known_issues: Combat balance issue: player with 9 strength hitting level 1 enemies for only 1 damage — monster defense being reduced by 80% to fix.

existing_features.title: In the combat engine, reduce all monster defense/armor values by 80%. This applies to base monster stat blocks and any defense contributions from monster prefixes/suffixes. A player with 9 strength should deal meaningful damage (significantly more than 1) to level 1 enemies after this change.
